title: When Arabs Danced
original_title: Au temps où les Arabes dansaient
overview: Writer, director, and journalist Jawad Rhalib presents a timely exploration of Muslim identity in relation to artistic expression and harmful stereotypes, through archival footage, interviews, and evocative performances.

trailers.title: Bande-annonce: "Au temps où les Arabes dansaient" de Jawad Rhalib
